basic_details.job_title: TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) Clinical Research Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on 13 July 2026 on the official website of Tata Memorial Centre. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

content_sections.heading: TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TMC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Clinical Research Coordinator post at TMC?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Clinical Research Coordinator position at Tata Memorial Centre is scheduled for 20th July 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Clinical Research Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The required qualification is B.Sc./B.Pharm with a mandatory PG Diploma in Clinical Research, or an equivalent qualification. Please refer to the official notification for detailed information.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Clinical Research Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Clinical Research Coordinator post is 45 years. There are no minimum age requirements specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Clinical Research Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Clinical Research Coordinator post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 27,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Clinical Research Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Clinical Research Coordinator position at Tata Memorial Centre through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Clinical Research Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-In Interview. If there are more candidates, a Written Test may be conducted, followed by a Skill Test/Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue for this TMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 221005. The exact venue address will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Clinical Research Coordinator position is contractual, as indicated in the recruitment details.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, ID proof, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).
